fields.summary: Register a new account and land on the notes page
fields.description: A new visitor can create an account from the registration form and is logged in automatically. Uses a unique email per run because the app rejects duplicates.

step.raw: Open the app and go to the registration page.
step.rendered: Open the app and go to the registration page.

result.raw: The registration form is shown with email, password and confirm-password fields.
result.rendered: The registration form is shown with email, password and confirm-password fields.

step.raw: Enter a unique new email and a password, repeat the same password in the confirm field, then submit the form.
step.rendered: Enter a unique new email and a password, repeat the same password in the confirm field, then submit the form.

data.raw: email: a unique address per run (e.g. qa-<timestamp>@demo.test); password: NewPass123!
data.rendered: email: a unique address per run; password: NewPass123!

result.raw: The account is created, the user is logged in automatically, and the notes page is shown with the new email in the navbar.
result.rendered: The account is created, the user is logged in, and the notes page is shown with the new email in the navbar.
